Event: The Dwarven Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/02/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AR204


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Jade Keeper Gear

Once in a while, when the armor wearer gains a buff, their damage is increased by 10% for 10 sec. Stacks up to 10 times.

Once in a while, the unit fires an enhanced arrow at 3 random enemies. The arrow deals physical damage equal to 200% of the unit's attack, and the armor wearer gains a shield equal to 100% of the damage dealt by the enhanced arrow. The shield absorbs damage of any type and lasts for up to 5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
